case_title: PATEL, CHARLIE B. vs. CARRILLIO, MARCO

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT CARRILLO, MARCO

JUDGE PRO TEM:FRANCIS MCKKEOWN/CLERK:ECLAVERIA/RPTR:DIANA PADILLA CAUSE ON FOR SETTLMEENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL, MR. MENDEZ, AND DEFT MARCO CARRILLO PRESENT & REPRESENTING PRO PER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS ON RECORD. PLFF PREPARES THE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARRILLO, MARCO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2791 - 16TH ST. #70, S.F. $2,796.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,796.00, STAYED UNTIL FEB-02-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 9:00AM. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO POSSESSION. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. MUTUAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS INCLUDING 1542CC. IF DFT COMPLIES DFT ENTITLED TO SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT OR AN EX PARTE APPLICATION AND ORDER VACATING JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE.
